texto: We do not create our destiny
autor: we participate in its unfolding. Synchronicity works as a catalyst toward the working out of that destiny.
explicacao: Citação de we participate in its unfolding. Synchronicity works as a catalyst toward the working out of that destiny. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “We do not create our destiny” articula reflexao, david-richo, create em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
